summary: The implementation successfully addresses all three requirements (REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3) for enabling admin users to change user status. The diff shows: (1) Backend additions include UserStatus enum type and updateUserStatus method in main.mo with migration support, (2) Frontend includes a new useSetUserStatus hook matching the pattern of useSetUserRole with proper query invalidation and toast notifications, and (3) UserStatusManagement component now displays status badges and includes handleStatusChange functionality with a status dropdown. All acceptance criteria appear to be met with no missing requirements or hallucinated features identified.
